Models

Models provide simulation and analytical capabilities.

Available Models

Model Purpose
Groundwater Interpolator Phreatic surface estimation
Flooding/Rewetting Inundation simulation
SPEI Forecasts Drought analysis
Peat Subsidence Subsidence assessment
Hydro-Met Analytics Time series analysis

Forecasting Tools

  • ARIMA
  • Machine Learning
  • SWAT

Common Features

  • Scenario simulations
  • Spatial outputs
  • Exportable results
  • Interactive configuration
